name: oabdelmaksoud--agi-farm
description: Interactive setup wizard that creates a fully working multi-agent AI team on OpenClaw. One command bootstraps agents, SOUL.md personas, comms infrastructure (inboxes/outboxes/broadcast), cron jobs, auto-dispatcher (HITL + rate-limit backoff + dependency checking), and a portable GitHub bundle — all customized to team name, size (3/5/11 agents), domain, and frameworks (autogen/crewai/langgraph). Includes a React + SSE live ops dashboard with file-watcher (~350ms push latency) and persistent macOS LaunchAgent. Model-selection guidance built in. Commands: setup | status | rebuild | export | dashboard | dispatch
